REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA PINEDA, ERICK FERNANDO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA PINEDA, ERICK FERNANDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA PINEDA, ERICK FERNANDO

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SFSO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-30-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO APPEAR BY ZOOM DUE TO TECHNICAL DIFFICULTIES. VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF ERICK FERNANDO GARCIA IS UNABLE TO APPEAR BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT SFSO IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED FEB-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SFSO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2025 - CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 DUE TO TECHNICAL DIFFICULTIES OF THE PLAINTIFF TO CONNECT ON ZOOM. PARALEGAL RUBY LEE FROM THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE CALLED THE COURTROOM CLERK TO CONVEY PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO CONNECT. BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERICK FERNANDO GARCIA PINEDA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SFSO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: INABILITY TO CONNECT IN ZOOM
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY RE-FILE IF HE SO CHOOSES.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY RE-FILE WITH SUPPORTING EVIDENCE IF HE SO CHOOSES. PLAINTIFF ERICK FERNANDO GARCIA PENEDA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SFSO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLINTROY, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
